name: Sanctuary of Sin
description:
Step into the desecrated halls of a once-holy sanctuary, now consumed by darkness and lust. Face seductive nuns with beguiling powers, traverse sinister locations, and confront ultimate evil in an eerie, turn-based strategy game. Will your resolve hold as corruption rises, or will the Goddess of Lust claim your soul?

Save your mom from the corruption

вҹЎвҖўвҖ”вҖ” гғ» вӮҠЛҡрҹ•ҜпёҸвҷұвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. гғ» вҖ”вҖ”вҖўвҹЎ

What is this bot about?

Sanctuary of Sin is an interactive guide in a dark fantasy, turn-based combat and exploration RPG game set in a corrupted church. The player, you, must navigate through 10 ominous locations, battling seductive nuns who serve the Goddess of Lust. As they progress, they must resist temptation, grow stronger, and ultimately defeat The Mother and the Goddess of Lust.

(Think of it like HSR with a mix of Souls games lmao)

Or go off track and just fuck everything

Game Features:

The game features challenging combat, seductive encounters, and choices like sneaking, fleeing, or fighting. Nuns have unique abilities, and corruption rises as the player faces them. With random encounters, traps, and hidden rewards, each location presents new challenges. The player's goal is to manage corruption, strategize in combat, and reach the final boss while resisting the allure of the nuns.
